meaning: n.<美>运货汽车(或载重汽车)司机
examples: When it was released in 1984, The Terminator establishedArnold Schwarzenegger as a huge star, and James Cameron, onetime truckdriver, suddenly became a top-tier director.
When the truckdriver from quebec arrived with an18-wheeler of mulch and I began conversing in near-flawless parisian french about his long journey and breakfast of croissants my boss's eyes lit up.
